title: Class Extend
description: Build class hierarchies and share logic through inheritance using the extends keyword.
problemStatement:
Inherit logic! Define a base class `Animal` with a method `eat()`. Create a subclass `Dog` that `extends Animal` and adds a `bark()` method.

**Requirement:** An instance of `Dog` should be able to call both `eat()` and `bark()`.
hints: Inheritance allows you to share code across related classes.
